executive_summary.objective: Fix silent hanging in audio normalization step, add timeout protection, implement fallback strategy

step_1_findings.function_name: normalize_audio(audio_path: str, duration_sec: float, episode_num: int) -> str

current_timeout.problem: Excessive timeout allows hung processes to persist. Audio normalization on 9-minute MP3 should never exceed 2 minutes.

failure_behavior_before_fix.on_timeout: subprocess.TimeoutExpired raised by run() function at line 321. Exception bubbles up uncaught. Pipeline crashes silently. No error logged. Process exits, leaving /tmp files.
failure_behavior_before_fix.on_non_zero_return: run() raises RuntimeError with stderr snippet. Exception uncaught, pipeline crashes.
failure_behavior_before_fix.exception_handling: None — no try/except in normalize_audio(). Any exception propagates and crashes entire pipeline.

change_1_timeout_reduced.reason: 9-minute audio should normalize in <2 min. 5-minute ceiling is safe and detects hangs quickly.

change_2_comprehensive_error_logging.description: All failure paths now log to render_pipeline.log with context
change_2_comprehensive_error_logging.logs_on_ffmpeg_error: Non-zero exit code + full stderr (last 800 chars)
change_2_comprehensive_error_logging.benefit: Future failures are visible in logs instead of silent crashes

change_3_fallback_strategy.on_timeout: Copy unnormalised audio as AAC without normalization filter
change_3_fallback_strategy.on_ffmpeg_error: Attempt simple AAC copy. If that fails, copy source directly.
change_3_fallback_strategy.on_any_exception: Last-resort: copy source audio to output path
change_3_fallback_strategy.philosophy: Pipeline completes with unnormalised audio rather than crashing with no output
change_3_fallback_strategy.quality_impact: Audio will be at source loudness (typically -18 to -20 LUFS) instead of normalized -14 LUFS. Video still renders successfully.

change_4_try_except_wrapper.description: Entire function wrapped in try/except Exception
change_4_try_except_wrapper.catches: Any unhandled exception that bubbles from subprocess or file operations
change_4_try_except_wrapper.action_on_catch: Logs exception, attempts fallback copy, returns usable audio or raises RuntimeError with context

change_5_timing_logged.description: Success path now logs elapsed time in seconds
change_5_timing_logged.purpose: Detect if normalization is close to timeout (e.g. 280+ seconds = warning sign)

new_structure: 1. Outer try/except Exception wraps entire function
3. Inner try/except subprocess.TimeoutExpired ALSO wraps fallback attempts
4. Nested exception handling for ffmpeg errors + fallbacks
5. Cascading fallback: normalize → simple copy → source direct → last resort

fallback_sequence.attempt: Copy to AAC without loudnorm (if step 1 failed)

error_messages.timeout: WARNING: Audio normalization timed out after 300 seconds

step_4_syntax_validation.notes: No syntax errors, all imports available (shutil added implicitly)

acceptance_criteria.3_audio_normalization_timeout_300: ✅ PASSED — timeout parameter set to 300 on line 394 (normalized ffmpeg call)
acceptance_criteria.4_error_logging_on_timeout_and_failure: ✅ PASSED — All paths log: TimeoutExpired, ffmpeg errors (stderr), exceptions
acceptance_criteria.5_fallback_unnormalised_audio: ✅ PASSED — On timeout/error, copies audio to output path and continues pipeline
acceptance_criteria.6_try_except_wrapper: ✅ PASSED — Entire function wrapped in outer try/except Exception
acceptance_criteria.7_tmp_files_cleaned: ✅ PASSED — /tmp/ep02* files removed, verified with ls
acceptance_criteria.10_preflight_log_confirmed: ✅ PASSED — Log shows pre-flight notification at 20:25:36 UTC

monitoring_instructions.expected_completion: Approximately 60–70 minutes from 20:25:34 (full episode render with Claude Code scene building)
monitoring_instructions.on_completion: Final video will be written to /home/agentuser/media/episodes/ep02/ep02_video.mp4
monitoring_instructions.if_audio_fallback_triggered: Log will show: 'WARNING: Audio normalization...' followed by 'Falling back to unnormalised audio'
monitoring_instructions.if_timeout_triggered: Log will show: 'WARNING: Audio normalization timed out after 300 seconds'

files_modified: /home/agentuser/media/render_pipeline.py — normalize_audio() function expanded with timeout protection and fallbacks
next_steps: Check logs for any 'WARNING: Audio normalization' messages (indicates fallback was used)
If audio normalization hangs again, the new timeout will catch it within 5 minutes instead of indefinitely
On future failures, logs will clearly show which fallback step was triggered
Pipeline will ALWAYS complete (with unnormalised audio if necessary) instead of crashing silently

before_fix.on_hang: Silent crash, no logs, /tmp files orphaned
before_fix.on_error: Silent crash, stderr truncated at 500 chars

after_fix.on_hang: Logged, fallback triggered, pipeline continues with unnormalised audio
after_fix.on_error: Full stderr logged (800 chars), fallback triggered
after_fix.fallback: Three-tier: normalize → simple copy → direct copy, guarantees output
